nasb.text: Saul thought, “I will give her to him that she may become a snare to him, and that the hand of the Philistines may be against him.” Therefore Saul said to David, “For a second time you may be my son-in-law today.”

esv.text: Saul thought, “Let me give her to him, that she may be a snare for him and that the hand of the Philistines may be against him.” Therefore Saul said to David a second time,  “You shall now be my son-in-law.”

cnv.text: 心裡想：“我要把米甲給大衛，利用米甲作他的陷阱，好讓非利士人的手害他。”於是掃羅對大衛說：“你今天可以第二次作我的女婿。”

ccb.text: 他心里想：“我把这个女儿给大卫，让他中圈套，好借非利士人的手杀掉他。”于是，他对大卫说：“你现在还有一次机会做我的女婿。”
